title: Mobile Suit Gundam: École du Ciel
description: The year is Universal Century 0085, 5 years have passed since the end of the most devastating war mankind has ever seen. Asuna Elmarit is a Zeon exchange student at the Earth Federation's pilot school in Montreal. Despite showing poor skills as a mobile suit pilot, her future and her mother's future rests on how well she does in school. Asuna soon finds herself caught in between her school work and the dark machinations at play as the Universal Century once again slowly moves on the path to yet another war, with the school in danger of being swallowed up by it.
author: Haruhiko Mikimoto
